summary: Updated TEST_INVENTORY.yaml for SRS.md v1.1 security additions. Changes: (1) Added NFR-08 inventory entry (fr_id: NFR-08, test_function: NFR-08_SECURITY_AUDIT) documenting that automated input-validation coverage is distributed across the 82-test suite, while security posture declarations (secret scanning, TLS absence, RBAC absence, log sanitization, dependency audit) require manual attestation — no standalone test_fr_NN.py file is created. (2) FR entries unchanged — their SPEC.md line citations were already correct (SPEC.md is immutable) and SRS.md section references (§3) are still valid. (3) expansion_plan: added nfr_08_security_note confirming NFR-08 does not alter declared_functions (10) or required_test_cases (82). (4) cross_refs: added links to TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md NFR traceability section, SRS.md §2.6 security posture, and SRS.md §4 NFRs. (5) Header updated to note v1.1 sync date. No new FR test functions invented. YAML structure preserved.
